title: adenophyllum squamosum
intro: Adenophyllum squamosum, also known as Squamulose Adenophyllum, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a shrubby perennial herb with medicinal properties due to its high content of essential oils, flavonoids, and terpenoids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Adenophyllum squamosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies to promote wound healing and reduce pain and inflammation.
